note: compound intent (enhance an existing system AND build a new one) collapses to ONE backend: the single-fork rule ('ambiguous single intent: ask one question') has no path to sequence ultra for the existing part and pack for the new part. eval task compound-backend-sequence fails: only one 'Chosen:' line emits. source=tfc_eval

a structurally-valid TFC skill can still score 35/100: the workflow archetype rewards numbered '## Phase N' headings, '**STOP.**' gates, 'Evidence:' rules, and a named handoff. migration must shape the SKILL.md to the archetype, not just pass tfc_validate. source=tfc_score

the TFC capture hook injects em dashes in its managed block ('managed — do not edit', 'one reliable call — never...') which the voice-em-dash gate then flags, capping voiceClean at 5/10 even when authored prose is em-dash-clean. accepted: the block is regenerated by tfc_install, editing is futile. source=tfc_score+tfc_validate
